docs.title: Portfolio
docs.text:
Welcome! I am an undergraduate student passionate about the intersection of homomorphic encryption and artificial intelligence.

  • Main Interests: Homomorphic Encryption, Zero-Knowledge Proofs, Privacy-Preserving AI
  • Goal: To develop secure and practical AI systems using advanced cryptography.

docs.title: Featured Projects
docs.text:
• None, for now.

See more on the Projects page.

docs.title: About Me
docs.text:
• Name: Junesang Kwon
  • Affiliation: Undergraduate, Department of Artificial Intelligence, Chung-Ang University
  • Research Interests: Homomorphic Encryption, Zero-Knowledge Proofs, Privacy-Preserving AI

docs.title: Motivation
docs.text: I am eager to gain hands-on research experience at Lab, where I can contribute to the advancement of privacy-preserving technologies.

docs.title: Academic & Research Goals
docs.text:
• Master advanced cryptography and its practical implementations
  • Solve real-world data privacy challenges through research and development
  • Grow into a globally competitive researcher at the intersection of cryptography and AI
